summary: Tested all P0 features for Service Hub Platform. All features working correctly: (1) Requester visibility of 'Assigned to' field in My Requests and Order Detail, (2) Created/Last Updated timestamps in Order Detail, (3) Requester-side close ticket with reason, (4) Label changed from 'Editor' to 'Assigned to'. Fixed one issue: Orders.js page had 'Editor' column header instead of 'Assigned to'.
passed_tests: P0-1: my-requests endpoint includes assigned_to_name field
P0-1: Order Detail shows 'Assigned to' label with editor name or 'Unassigned'
P0-2: Order Detail shows 'Created' timestamp with date and time
P0-2: Order Detail shows 'Last Updated' timestamp with date and time
P0-3: Close Ticket button visible for requester's own open tickets
P0-3: Close dialog requires reason before closing
P0-3: Ticket status changes to 'Closed' after closing
P0-3: 'Closed At' timestamp displayed after closing
P0-3: Close Ticket button hidden for already closed tickets
P0-4: Order Detail sidebar shows 'Assigned to' label (not 'Editor')
P0-4: Orders list page shows 'Assigned to' column header (fixed)
P0-4: My Requests list shows 'Assigned to:' label for assigned tickets
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/Orders.js - Changed 'Editor' column header to 'Assigned to', changed filter placeholder from 'Editor' to 'Assigned to', changed 'All Editors' to 'All Assignees'
seed_data_creation: Created test orders: TEST_P0_Close_Test_Order (RRG-000007), TEST_P0_UI_Close_Test_2 (RRG-000008) - both closed during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 features verified working. Backend has /api/orders/{order_id}/close endpoint with CloseOrderRequest model requiring reason field. Frontend OrderDetail.js has close dialog with data-testid attributes: close-ticket-btn, close-reason-input, confirm-close-btn. CommandCenter.js My Requests list shows assigned_to_name. Orders.js now shows 'Assigned to' instead of 'Editor'. Test credentials: admin@redribbonops.com / Fmtvvl171**, testrequester@test.com / Test123!

P0-1_requester_visibility.my_requests_assigned_to_name: WORKING - assigned_to_name field included in /api/my-requests response
P0-1_requester_visibility.order_detail_assigned_to: WORKING - 'Assigned to' label shows editor name or 'Unassigned'

P0-2_timestamps.created_timestamp: WORKING - Shows 'Created' with formatted date/time (e.g., Jan 25, 2026 • 8:38 PM)
P0-2_timestamps.last_updated_timestamp: WORKING - Shows 'Last Updated' with formatted date/time
P0-2_timestamps.closed_at_timestamp: WORKING - Shows 'Closed At' for closed tickets

P0-3_requester_close.close_button_visibility: WORKING - Button visible for requester's own open tickets, hidden for closed/delivered
P0-3_requester_close.close_dialog: WORKING - Dialog with reason textarea and Cancel/Close Ticket buttons
P0-3_requester_close.reason_required: WORKING - Backend validates reason field (min 1 char, max 500)
P0-3_requester_close.status_change: WORKING - Status changes to 'Closed' after closing
P0-3_requester_close.closed_at_display: WORKING - Closed At timestamp displayed in Order Info sidebar
P0-3_requester_close.close_reason_display: WORKING - Close Reason displayed in Order Info sidebar

P0-4_label_change.my_requests_list: WORKING - Shows 'Assigned to:' with editor name
